claims.description: The recorded before/after table is grounded in the four corrected flow dispositions and the final reviewed implementation.
Planner regression coverage proves prose-PARKED flows require blocked/manual tags and are excluded from scheduled plans.
The duplicate learner populated-memory journey is retired while the supported parent-native route remains scheduled.
Dictation flows scroll to the current control and the release runner supplies a deterministic media fixture.
Empty learner Mentor Memory returns through the supported More interaction and verifies restored navigation state.
The release-APK runner provides required E2E seams and sanitizes retained artifacts without a dev-client or Metro dependency.
Structural tests cover plan inclusion/exclusion, overrides, corrected dispositions, and duplicate semantic coverage.
The manual nightly workflow executes all eight release-APK Maestro shards rather than accepting skipped push jobs.
The machine-generated nightly plan and completion summary record the executable count and final eight-shard receipt.
